description: Internal structured-input benchmark for the artifact-driven multi-agent manuscript system. It scores the current repo against stable drafting, evidence, and guardrail expectations without claiming official external benchmark equivalence.
notes: This suite is inspired by PaperWritingBench's pre-writing-material framing, but it runs entirely on repo-local artifacts.
The score reflects manuscript-system integrity and harness-substrate guardrails, not human-judged prose quality.

cases.description: The tracked demo manuscript should remain structurally ready across claim coverage, section scaffolding, references, review evidence, and the cross-cutting audit while still distinguishing real-submission gates from general repo health.

Author-supplied topic, section framing, and claim-specific notes should propagate cleanly from the author-input file through claim packets, section briefs, and draft scaffolds without breaking readiness.

checks.label: topic
checks.actual: Therapy response trajectories in a multimodal benchmark
checks.expected: Therapy response trajectories in a multimodal benchmark

checks.label: results_section_note_contains
checks.actual: Start the Results with the strongest treatment-response separation.

checks.label: claim_response_kinetics_claim_packet_note_contains
checks.actual: Use this as the opening sentence for the first results subsection.

checks.label: claim_response_kinetics_draft_subsection_note_contains
checks.actual: Use this as the opening sentence for the first results subsection.

cases.description: The pipeline should fail early and clearly when an author note targets a claim id that is not present in the tracked evidence layer.

checks.label: expected_error_contains
checks.actual: author_content_inputs.json contains unknown claim_ids: claim_not_in_repo. Decide whether to add or replace the underlying fact-sheet/display-item claim before generating drafts.

metrics.error_message: author_content_inputs.json contains unknown claim_ids: claim_not_in_repo. Decide whether to add or replace the underlying fact-sheet/display-item claim before generating drafts.
